---
title: Roadmap
subtitle: What exists, what is being designed, what is deliberately deferred
---

BDM is developed openly and incrementally. This page tracks what is not done
yet, so that nothing has to pretend.

## Being designed

- **Models** — how inferences about agents are stored and versioned
  ([draft notes](/spec/models/index.qmd)).
- **Timeseries** — EEG, eye tracking, physiological recordings
  ([open design area](/spec/timeseries.qmd)).

## Planned guides

Several how-to guides are planned but not yet written. If one of these would
help you, [open an issue](https://github.com/behaverse/data-model/issues/new)
to help us prioritize:

multi-task studies · events data · longitudinal and test–retest studies ·
multi-agent datasets · dataset validation · combining datasets ·
compatible datasets · AI agents on BDM data

## Deliberately out of scope (for now)

- A style validator for naming conventions (the conventions are prose-first).
- A BDM-defined timeseries payload format (we point to BIDS/EDF instead).
